left-inhale: Breathe in healing prana through your left nostril
Draw in restorative prana through the left nostril
Inhale renewing prana gently through your left nostril
right-exhale: Release stress and tension through your right nostril
Exhale and let go of strain through the right nostril
Breathe out stress, release it through your right nostril
right-inhale: Breathe in revitalizing prana through your right nostril
Draw healing energy into your body through the right nostril
Inhale renewing prana slowly through your right nostril
left-exhale: Exhale and release tension through your left nostril
Let go of discomfort through the left nostril
Breathe out stress and soften through your left nostril
hold: Hold the healing breath gently within
Retain the prana, feel restoration inside
Keep the breath steady, let healing spread
